ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "training_method" TEXT /* Training method used in the experiment (e.g., batch, online, transfer learning) */,
  "hyperparameter_config" TEXT /* Hyperparameter configuration as a JSON object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model architecture */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Deep learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "library_version" TEXT /* Version of the deep learning library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, loss, model iterations) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the iteration belongs to */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "iteration_loss" REAL /* Loss at the current iteration */,
  "iteration_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy at the current iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_iterations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the round belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number */,
  "round_time" REAL /* Time taken for the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_rounds_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wall_time" (
  "wall_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wall time entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the wall time belongs to */,
  "wall_time_value" REAL /* Wall time value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wall_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wall_time_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_users" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Performance value */,
  "performance_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameter_tuning" (
  "tuning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter tuning result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tuning result belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_config" TEXT /* Hyperparameter configuration as a JSON object */,
  "tuning_result" REAL /* Result of the hyperparameter tuning (e.g., best performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tuning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameter_tuning_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the configuration belongs to */,
  "gpu_type" TEXT /* Type of GPU used (e.g., NVIDIA Tesla V100) */,
  "num_gpus" INTEGER /* Number of GPUs used */,
  "num_cpus" INTEGER /* Number of CPUs used */,
  "memory" INTEGER /* Amount of memory used (in GB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_config_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
